body.u: At the age of 67 I look back to see what I have adchievedachieved over 50 years up until I was 17.
At the time of leaving school I lived the life or as close to what I wanted to live my own way and not what other people wanted to do.

My first job was the first big break, I was out on my own I paced through that job, starting from a jouniorjunior on the business world working up the promotion line, gaining more and more confidence.
After the first 20 years saving money was appreciated for the first time by actually being able to afordafford to live away from home by myself.
Marriage then took its course. A family wasn’t thought of until 5 years of marriage. We lived in Chatham and settled down there too.

Leaving a job was hard. After 15 years of bringing up two children work was just another thing to fall back on. I had one stedysteady job up until the age of retiring. This job was very simularsimilar to what I start off in and being experienced in the business world it wasn’t hard to catch on to.
